text: User: Welcome the visitor warmly. In your greeting, clearly say that Translink is the ONE STOP SOLUTION for fleet telematics, GPS tracking, fuel management, and AI-driven safety across East Africa. Keep it to 2 short, natural sentences. Sound calm, premium, professional, and helpful. Invite them to ask a fleet-related question.
